main.description:
Community-side confirmation of a member. Written to the COMMUNITY's PDS — one record per member (NOT a singleton, so this scales to millions of members). The rkey is a TID; the member is identified by the 'memberDid' field. Paired with com.wumblr.member on the user's PDS; both are required for active membership.

The 'cid' field is the CID of the user's matching com.wumblr.member record at the moment of confirmation. This cross-reference is the cryptographic anchor proving both records refer to the same join event — OpenSocial hit repeated bugs without this. Modeled after community.opensocial.membershipProof.

Partial states:
  member ✓ + proof ✓  = active member
  member ✓ + proof ✗  = removed (or pending in invite-mode)
  member ✗ + proof ✓  = user left voluntarily

cid.description: CID of the user's com.wumblr.member record at confirmation time.
